Reservation Policy
Reservations are confirmed within 30 minutes via phone or WhatsApp.
Tables are held for 15 minutes past the reserved time. Please call if you are running late.
For groups of 10 or more, please contact us directly to arrange.
Same-day reservations are welcome subject to availability.
